task_description: Search for rental cars in London and filter the results to airport terminal pickup and automatic transmission options.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed crop shows the Windows taskbar with several app icons; the semitransparent red X is centered on the Google Chrome icon, a circular red, yellow, and green ring with a blue center, inside a light rounded square background. Nearby are a blue-and-white wave app icon on the left and a green chat bubble icon on the right. The full screen shows the Windows 11 desktop with many shortcuts arranged on the left, a blue abstract wallpaper, and the centered taskbar at the bottom where Chrome is pinned.
caption.action: Click the Google Chrome taskbar icon.
caption.expectation: Google Chrome should launch or come to the foreground, opening a browser window.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows the top-right area of the Chrome window. The semitransparent red X is centered on the small square maximize button between the minimize dash and the close X, so the target is a top-area window control. The full screen shows Google Chrome open on a new tab page with the Google logo, search/address bar focused at the top, and the browser window not yet maximized, leaving the Windows desktop icons visible on the left.
caption.action: Click the maximize button in the top-right corner of the Chrome window.
caption.expectation: The Chrome window should maximize to fill the screen.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows a blank light-gray area directly beneath the colorful Google logo and above the search suggestions list, with the semitransparent red X centered on this empty region rather than on any button, icon, or text field. The full screen shows a maximized Chrome new tab page with the Google homepage, the central rounded search box already active and showing a blinking text cursor, a dropdown of previous searches and shortcuts below it, and top-right links such as Gmail, Images, the Google apps grid, and the profile avatar.
caption.action: Click the blank area under the Google logo and above the suggestions list.
caption.expectation: The click should dismiss the suggestions dropdown or shift focus to the page background without opening any menu or selecting a control.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows a plain light-gray blank area directly below the multicolored Google logo, with the semitransparent red X centered on empty page background rather than on a button, icon, text field, or suggestion item. The full screen shows a maximized Chrome new tab page with the central Google search box active, a blinking text cursor inside it, a dropdown list of search suggestions below, and a Chrome update notification panel open in the upper-right.
caption.action: Click the blank page area beneath the Google logo.
caption.expectation: The active search suggestions dropdown should dismiss or lose focus, with no menu opened and no object selected.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The crop focuses on the central Google search field, a rounded white search box with a magnifying-glass icon on the left. The text entry area contains the word "booking" being entered, with autocomplete suggestions immediately below including a plain "booking" search suggestion and several Booking.com-related results. The typing appears to complete the current query in the active field rather than replacing some other visible text. The full screen shows a maximized Chrome new tab page in Chinese, the large multicolored Google logo centered above the search box, suggestion dropdown expanded, top-right links such as Gmail and Images, and the Windows taskbar visible at the bottom.
caption.action: Type "BOOKING" into the active Google search field.
caption.expectation: The search box should show the completed query "booking" and the autocomplete suggestions should refresh to match that term.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows the Google search box area with the query text "booking" entered and the autocomplete row beneath it, including Chinese input candidate items such as numbered choices like "3 跛", "4 博", and "5 波"; a semitransparent red X is visible over this area, but the raw action indicates a keyboard action rather than a click. The full screen shows a maximized Chrome window on the Google homepage in Chinese, with the large Google logo centered, the rounded search field active, a dropdown of search suggestions/results related to Booking.com open below, and standard Chrome toolbar elements at the top.
caption.action: Press ENTER.
caption.expectation: Google should submit the current query and navigate from the homepage to the search results page for "booking".

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The crop is centered on the Google search area, showing the query text "booking" in the active search box with the autocomplete list directly below; although a semitransparent red X is visible over the search area, the raw action is a keyboard action, so the focus is on the active query field and suggestion list. The full screen shows a maximized Chrome window on the Google homepage in Chinese, with the large Google logo centered, the rounded search box active, multiple search suggestions and Booking-related results expanded beneath it, and standard browser controls across the top.
caption.action: Press ENTER.
caption.expectation: Google should submit the current query and open the search results page for "booking".

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a sponsored Google result for Booking.com. A blue circular logo with a white capital letter B appears to the left, the domain text and vertical three-dot menu are above, and the semitransparent red X is centered directly on the purple underlined title link "Booking.com." The full screen shows a Google results page in Chrome for the query "booking," with the sponsored Booking.com result near the top of the results list and additional travel-related results below.
caption.action: Click the purple underlined "Booking.com" result link.
caption.expectation: The Booking.com result should be selected and Chrome should begin navigating to the Booking.com website.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a pill-shaped navigation tab in the Booking.com header with a white car icon and the Chinese label "租车" on a blue background. A semitransparent red X is centered directly over this tab, indicating the target is that top navigation control. The full screen shows the Booking.com homepage in Chinese inside Chrome, with a dark blue header, category tabs for stays, flights, flight + hotel, car rentals, attractions, and airport taxis, plus the main lodging search form below.
caption.action: Click the "租车" car-rental tab in the top navigation bar.
caption.expectation: The car-rental section should become selected, likely updating the page to show car rental search options or navigate to the car rentals page.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows the leftmost pickup-location field in the Booking.com car rental search form. Inside the white rounded field is the location text "Hong Kong International Airport (HKG), Hong Kong, Hong Kong," and a semitransparent red X is centered over the field near its clear-entry area with a black X icon. The full screen shows the Booking.com car rentals page in Chinese, with a dark blue header, the car rental tab selected, a large headline about finding the right car, and a horizontal search form containing pickup location, pickup date and time, return date and time, plus a blue "搜索" button.
caption.action: Click the pickup-location field showing "Hong Kong International Airport (HKG), Hong Kong, Hong Kong."
caption.expectation: The location field should become active, likely placing the cursor in the field or opening location editing suggestions so the pickup location can be changed.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The visible entry area is the pickup-location field at the left of the Booking.com car rental search form. It shows a location pin icon, the Chinese placeholder label for pickup location, and the text being entered as "Londo," indicating the user is typing a city name into the active field and replacing the previous airport value. A dropdown suggestion panel is open directly beneath the field, listing matching results such as "1 London," "2 Londonderry," "3 Londoner," and place suggestions including Heathrow Airport, Central London, London city options, Gatwick Airport, and Stansted Airport. The full screen shows the Booking.com car rentals page in Chinese with a dark blue header, the car-rental tab selected, date and time fields to the right of the location field, and a blue "搜索" search button.
caption.action: Type "LONDON" into the active pickup-location field.
caption.expectation: The field should update to the typed London text and the suggestions list should refresh or remain open with London-related pickup options to choose from.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows the active Booking.com car-rental search form with the pickup-location field filled with the typed text "London" and a dropdown list of matching suggestions directly below it. A semitransparent red X is positioned over the small heart-shaped bookmark/favorite icon inside the suggestion bar area near the right side of the first row controls. The full screen shows the Booking.com car rentals page in Chinese with a dark blue header, the car-rental tab selected, date and time fields to the right of the location field, the blue "搜索" button, and the suggestion list containing options such as London Heathrow Airport, Central London, London, London Gatwick Airport, and London Stansted Airport.
caption.action: Press Enter.
caption.expectation: The highlighted or default London suggestion should be selected as the pickup location, and the suggestions panel should close while keeping the search form ready for the next step.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a dropdown list of London-related pickup suggestions, and the semitransparent red X is centered on the first suggestion row labeled "London Heathrow Airport (LHR)" with the smaller location text below it. The full screen shows the Booking.com car rental page in Chinese with the pickup-location field containing "London," the suggestions panel open beneath it, date and time fields to the right, and a blue "搜索" search button.
caption.action: Click the first suggestion, "London Heathrow Airport (LHR)," in the dropdown list.
caption.expectation: That airport should be selected as the pickup location, the suggestions list should close, and the chosen location should appear in the pickup field.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows the date input control in the car-rental search form, with a small calendar icon on the left, the label for pickup date above, and the displayed date "4月8日周三". A semitransparent red X is centered on this date field, indicating the click target is the date control itself. The full screen shows the Booking.com car-rental page in Chinese, with the selected pickup location set to "London Heathrow Airport (LHR), London, United Kingdom," adjacent time and return date/time fields, and a blue "搜索" button on the right.
caption.action: Click the pickup date field showing the calendar icon and the date "4月8日周三."
caption.expectation: The pickup date field should become active and a date picker calendar should open for selecting the rental start date.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a calendar date cell with the number "11" on a blue highlighted square, and a semitransparent red X centered directly on that date cell. Nearby dates such as 9, 10, and 12 are visible in the same week row. The full screen shows the Booking.com car-rental search page in Chinese with the date picker open below the search form; the pickup location is set to London Heathrow Airport, the pickup date field currently shows "4月8日周三," and the return date field shows "4月11日周六."
caption.action: Click the date cell labeled "11" in the calendar popup.
caption.expectation: The selected end date should update to the 11th, with that date remaining highlighted in the calendar and the rental date range reflected in the search form.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows the return date field in the Booking.com car-rental search bar, with a gray calendar icon on the left, the label "还车日期" above, and the date text "4月12日周日" inside the box. A semitransparent red X is centered on this return-date field, so the click target is that date control. The full screen shows the Booking.com car-rental page in Chinese with the pickup location set to London Heathrow Airport, the pickup date already set to "4月11日周六," time fields on both sides of the return-date field, the blue "搜索" button to the right, and the calendar popup still open below the search bar.
caption.action: Click the return date field showing the calendar icon and the date "4月12日周日."
caption.expectation: The return date control should become active, with the calendar remaining open or refocusing to let you choose the return date.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a calendar popup date cell labeled "13" with a semitransparent red X centered directly on that date number, indicating the target is that date cell in the calendar. The full screen shows the Booking.com car-rental page in Chinese with the car rental tab selected, the search bar containing London Heathrow Airport as the pickup location, pickup date set to "4月11日周六," return date currently set to "4月12日周日," and the date picker open below with April 2026 and May 2026 calendars visible.
caption.action: Click the calendar date cell labeled "13."
caption.expectation: The return date should update to the 13th, and the calendar selection should move to that date while reflecting the new rental period in the search form.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows the car-rental search bar, with a time field containing a gray clock icon and the time text "16:00." A semitransparent red X is centered directly over this return-time field, so the target is that time input control. The full screen shows the Booking.com car-rental page in Chinese in Chrome, with the pickup location set to London Heathrow Airport, pickup date "4月11日周六," return date "4月13日周一," the blue "搜索" button to the right, and filter and promotional sections below.
caption.action: Click the return time field showing the clock icon and "16:00."
caption.expectation: The return-time control should become active, likely opening a time-selection dropdown or placing focus in the field so the return time can be changed.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a vertical time-selection dropdown list with half-hour entries such as 11:00, 11:30, 12:00, and 12:30. A semitransparent red X is centered directly on the blue-highlighted row labeled "12:00," indicating the target is that time option in the dropdown. The full screen shows the Booking.com car-rental search form in Chrome, with London Heathrow Airport as the pickup location, pickup date set to 4月11日周六, return date set to 4月13日周一, the return-time dropdown open beside the search bar, and the blue 搜索 button to the right.
caption.action: Click the "12:00" option in the return-time dropdown list.
caption.expectation: The return time should update to 12:00, and the dropdown menu should close with the selected time shown in the return-time field.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows the right end of the Booking.com car-rental search bar. A semitransparent red X is centered on the large blue rectangular button labeled "搜索" in white, indicating the target is this search button UI control. To its left are the return time field showing a gray clock icon and "12:00." The full screen shows the Booking.com car-rental page in Chinese with the location set to London Heathrow Airport, pickup date "4月11日周六," pickup time "10:00," return date "4月13日周一," and return time "12:00," with filter and promo sections below.
caption.action: Click the blue "搜索" button.
caption.expectation: The search should be submitted, and the page should begin loading car rental results for the selected location, dates, and times.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows the top-right corner of a white modal dialog with rounded corners. A semitransparent red X is centered on a small gray close button marked with an "X," indicating the target is the modal's close control. The full screen shows the Booking.com car rental results page dimmed behind the modal, with the search bar at the top, filter options on the left, and a login/signup pop-up in the center featuring the Booking.com Genius branding and a blue sign-in/register button.
caption.action: Click the small gray "X" close button at the top-right of the login pop-up.
caption.expectation: The login modal should close, removing the dim overlay and returning focus to the car rental results page.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows the left filter sidebar under the bold heading "筛选". In the "地点" section, a semitransparent red X is centered on the first empty square checkbox beside the label "机场（航站楼内）", identifying that checkbox as the target control. The full screen shows the Booking.com car rental results page in Chinese, with the search bar across the top, car category icons in the middle, and rental listings on the right; the filter panel is on the left.
caption.action: Click the checkbox next to "机场（航站楼内）" in the left filter panel.
caption.expectation: That location filter should become selected, and the results list should refresh to show cars matching the terminal pickup location.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows the left filter sidebar in the results page. Under the bold section heading "传动方式," a semitransparent red X is centered on the empty square checkbox beside the label "自动挡," so the target is that automatic-transmission filter checkbox. The full screen shows the Booking.com car rental results page in Chinese, with the search bar across the top, the results count and car category icons in the center, listings on the right, and the filter panel on the left; the page is already filtered for airport terminal pickup.
caption.action: Click the empty checkbox next to "自动挡" in the left filter panel.
caption.expectation: The checkbox should become selected, and the results should refresh to show cars with automatic transmission.
